op.text: [as of 2025-08-02] Production incident at work following interoperability platform launch; executive using Dana as single point of contact at all hours; described work as 'pressure cooker' and 'has me by the throat'

[as of 2025-08-02] Snapped at Sam over dinner question Tuesday 2025-07-29 due to work stress ('I genuinely could not care less about dinner, Sam'); apologized properly next morning; Sam responded 'you're carrying a lot, but I'm not the incident'; relationship repaired immediately; Dana noted 'six years and we don't do the snipe-at-each-other thing'
